purpose: Regenerate 5 click-action HUD icons in painted-vignette style (matches cmd-rally.png + cmd-vlaai-trakteer.png anchors). Replaces flat-3D transparent off-brand versions.
style_template: painted RPG card art action icon, [SUBJECT], centered on dark moody vignette background with [FACTION-GRADIENT], ornate gold curved frame border, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, oil painting texture, fantasy game ability icon, no text, museum quality
remove_bg_reason: Vignette + gold frame ARE the design. BiRefNet would destroy the painted aesthetic.
